external_references.description: AhnLab. (2022, April 4). SystemBC Being Used by Various Attackers . Retrieved June 18, 2025.
Gallagher, S., Gn, S. (2020, December 16). Ransomware operators use SystemBC RAT as off-the-shelf Tor backdoor. Retrieved May 16, 2025.
Harmon, K., et al. (2019, August 1). SystemBC is like Christmas in July for SOCKS5 Malware and Exploit Kits . Retrieved June 13, 2025.

objects.description: [SystemBC](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9001) has collected username  , build number and serial number, then sent the information to the C2 server.(Citation: SophosGnGal_SystemBC_Dec2020)(Citation: AhnLab_SystemBC_Apr2022) [SystemBC](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9001) has also gathered device name, operating system, and processor type.(Citation: HarmonProofpoint_SystemBC_Aug2019)
